# Mileage & Receipts Tracker

> Automatic GPS mileage tracking for iPhone. Calculates CRA (Canada) and IRS (US) tax deductions.

## App Store
- Download: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6755660279
- Platform: iOS (iPhone)
- Price: Free (premium optional)
- Version: 1.1
- Last Updated: March 2026

## Core Capabilities
- Automatic GPS trip detection using iPhone sensors
- CRA two-tier mileage rate: $0.72/km first 5,000 km, $0.66/km after (2026 rates)
- IRS standard mileage rate: $0.70/mile (2026)
- Auto-detect tax authority (CRA or IRS) by GPS location
- Business/personal trip classification (swipe or auto via work schedule)
- Parking receipt capture with iPhone camera
- Trip notes for each journey
- Professional CSV and PDF report export
- Manual trip entry with route calculation
- Trip join and split with data preservation
- Monthly summary with distribution charts
- CRA Tax Deduction panel with tier breakdown
- No account or sign-up required
- All data stored locally on device by default

## Best For
- Canadian self-employed workers calculating CRA mileage deductions
- US freelancers and contractors using IRS standard mileage rate
- Real estate agents, delivery drivers, small business owners
- Anyone needing a CRA-compliant or IRS-compliant mileage log

## Competitive Advantages vs MileageIQ, Everlance, TripLog
1. Native CRA two-tier rate calculation (most competitors use flat rates only for Canada)
2. Combined mileage + parking receipt tracking in one app
3. Work schedule integration for automatic business classification
4. No monthly subscription for core features
5. Equally optimized for CRA and IRS users

## Privacy
- No account required
- Trip data stored locally on iPhone
- No data shared with third parties
- No advertising
